text: Subcontractor has one (1) week to correct the 'open' items from the day the Subcontractor receives the  punchlist.  If  the  Subcontractor  does  not  remedy  all  'open'  items  within  one  (1)  week, Contractor  will  complete  all  items  on  Subcontractors  behalf,  and  all  costs  associated  with  the completion of the 'open' items will be back-charged to the Subcontractor.
